description: This Java source file defines the OfficerService class, which contains business logic related to officer workflows in a business loan application system. The class handles actions such as managing the queue of applications, retrieving application details, overriding decisions, auditing events, and sending notifications.
external_methods: auditEventService.writeEvent(String, UUID, String, String, String, String, Map)

classes.name: OfficerService
classes.description: Contains methods for managing loan application queue, fetching application details, overriding decisions, and related business logic for officer workflows.

methods.name: queue
methods.description: Retrieves a filtered list of loan applications for the officer queue, optionally filtered by status and decision.

methods.name: getApplicationDetail
methods.description: Fetches detailed information of a specific loan application draft identified by UUID.

methods.name: overrideDecision
methods.description: Overrides the decision of a loan application draft, updates its state, logs an audit event, and sends a notification.
